name: Peach Cobbler with Cheddar Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------------CHEDDAR BISCUITS-------------------------------
1 cup Biscuit Mix (e.g., Bisquick)
1/2 tablespoon Butter, melted
1/2 cup Cheddar cheese, grated
1/3 cup Milk
Preheat the oven to 400°F. Place the peaches in a greased baking pan. Mix the sugar, cornstarch, and salt, then sprinkle over the peaches. Sprinkle the lemon juice and almond extract over the peach mixture. Place the baking pan in the preheated oven and bake for 15 minutes. Meanwhile, make the biscuits by combining all of the ingredients, stirring well. Remove the baking pan from the oven and drop the dough onto the hot peach mixture. Return the pan to the oven and bake for an additional 20 minutes or until the biscuits are golden brown. Serve warm with whipped topping or ice cream.
